zoho-crm.commission: 15% of revenue for first 12 months, capped at $25,000 per deal. 90-day cookie. Monthly PayPal payouts.

freshworks.commission: 20% recurring for first year (base), 25% for 100+ signups (Power), custom for 200+ (Champion). 90-day cookie. $1K MRR bonus eligible.

razorpay.commission: Up to Rs 500 per referral bonus + up to 0.1% of transaction value (recurring). Free onboarding.

instamojo.commission: Recurring revenue based on client transactions. Dedicated relationship manager. Free signup.

browserstack.note: No public affiliate program. Has partner/reseller program only (for businesses). Referral gives free months, no cash commission.
